headline: DOW vs. DD: Which Chemical Giant Deserves a Spot in Your Portfolio?
summary: DOW and DD are pursuing strategic growth strategies as demand and cost pressures persist.

headline: Is DuPont De Nemours (DD) Undervalued After Its New Lithium Extraction Push?
summary: DuPont de Nemours (DD) has drawn fresh attention after launching an end-to-end Direct Lithium Extraction portfolio, offering more than 20 technologies that aim to support scalable lithium production as demand for electric vehicles and energy storage grows. See our latest analysis for DuPont de Nemours. While DuPont de Nemours is pushing into Direct Lithium Extraction and digital water tools, the share price has slipped around 6.8% over the past month and about 5.5% over the past quarter, even...
